meaning: n.(据已问世文艺作品的情节凭想象上溯创作的)先行篇,前篇
examples: Fans waited for years for the first Star Wars prequel.
Another hoped it could be a prequel to Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone.
One major project that MGM needs to fund is Peter Jackson’s “The Hobbit” prequel.
Pixar unleashes their official summer entry, the Monsters Inc. prequel Monsters University on June 21st.
It was followed a year later with the prequel, Gods of the Arena (January 21, 2011).
